title: RuPaul's Drag Race: Werq the World
full_description: The world's largest drag production brings an entire universe of drag to the stage — featuring queens from RuPaul's Drag Race in a high-camp extravaganza of choreography, lip-syncs, comedy and couture. Production values on a concert scale, with jumbotron screens, elaborate staging, and an international cast.
ai_summary: The world's largest touring drag show — featuring RuPaul's Drag Race alumni in a full-scale concert production of original performances, lip-syncs, and comedy. The 2023 edition featured Asia O'Hara, Bosco, Lady Camden, Laganja Estranja, and surprise guests from Season 15.
